category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a Go implementation of djb's redo, a Makefile replacement.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is goredo; source_facts.homepage is the official goredo site.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project site and best official documentation surface for goredo.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official metadata provides source archives from goredo.dabase.com but no confirmed official source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies redo/Makefile-replacement functionality; source_facts.executables lists goredo and redo helper commands.
